title: pelargonium lanceolatum
intro: Pelargonium lanceolatum, also known as Red Apple Leaf or Cape Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium lanceolatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often made into a tea, which can be used to treat various ailments, while the oil extracted from the plant is used in aromatherapy and skincare products.
